data.headline: Ashley Brooks — Listing Coordinator
data.tagline: Every listing, every detail, handled with care.

items.title: Listing Management
items.description: From professional photography to MLS entry, I manage every detail of your listing from start to finish.

items.title: Staging & Presentation
items.description: I coordinate staging consultations and ensure your home shows at its absolute best.

items.title: Marketing & Exposure
items.description: Targeted digital marketing, open house coordination, and social media promotion to reach the right buyers.

data.title: Ready to List Your Home?
data.subtitle: Let's get your home sold for top dollar.

data.bio: Ashley Brooks coordinates listings for Santiago Realty, ensuring every property is presented beautifully and reaches the right buyers. With a background in marketing and an eye for detail, Ashley manages the entire listing lifecycle — from staging consultation through closing day.
